top_signals.title: Russia used social engineering to breach prominent messaging accounts, Ukraine says
top_signals.summary: Ukraine's SBU described a long-running Russian operation that used fake tech-support workers to persuade people to hand over credentials to their messaging apps.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan ‘snow monkey’ park to cap visitors after overcrowding and bad behavior
top_signals.summary: As the number of tourists snowballed, so did instances of bad behavior, such as trying to feed or touch the monkeys.
